C

cargarCSVProductos(InputStream) - Method in interface co.edu.unbosque.producto.service.CRUDOperations
Loads products from a CSV file input stream.
cargarCSVProductos(InputStream) - Method in class co.edu.unbosque.producto.service.ProductoService
Loads Productos from a CSV input stream.
cargarProductos(MultipartFile) - Method in class co.edu.unbosque.producto.controller.ProductoController
Endpoint to upload products from a CSV file.
co.edu.unbosque.producto - package co.edu.unbosque.producto
Package containing the main entry point for the product service application.
co.edu.unbosque.producto.controller - package co.edu.unbosque.producto.controller
Package containing REST controllers for product management.
co.edu.unbosque.producto.model - package co.edu.unbosque.producto.model
Package containing the entity classes related to products.
co.edu.unbosque.producto.repository - package co.edu.unbosque.producto.repository
Package containing repository interfaces for product entities.
co.edu.unbosque.producto.service - package co.edu.unbosque.producto.service
Package containing service classes for managing Producto entities.
crear(Producto) - Method in class co.edu.unbosque.producto.controller.ProductoController
Endpoint to create a new product.
crear(Producto) - Method in class co.edu.unbosque.producto.service.ProductoService
Creates a new Producto.
crear(T) - Method in interface co.edu.unbosque.producto.service.CRUDOperations
Create a new record for the given entity.
CRUDOperations<T> - Interface in co.edu.unbosque.producto.service
Generic interface defining basic CRUD operations that service classes implement for their corresponding domain entities.
